rationale: Distal Nav ablation crossed with a length sweep on t0022 is most informative after t0043 has installed a proper Nav1.6 / Kv3 inventory. Running the ablation against the current lumped-HHst testbed would measure an ablation of a channel that does not match published DSGC channel priors (t0019). Deprioritising from high to medium until t0043 lands.
